name: &BThe Temple of the Elves&n
description:
You are in the Temple of Elves, a nature worshiping paradise. It is
a very beautifull place, the large amount of flowers gives a special bloom
to the place. In the walls you can see illustrations of trees and some
legendary elves. Birds and butterflies constantly enters and leaves by the
window.
   The exit to the Temple Street is to the South.
